---
title: Notes
listing:
  contents:
    - '*.qmd'
  type: default
  sort: date desc
  fields:
    - title
    - date
    - reading-time
    - author
jupyter:
  jupytext:
    text_representation:
      extension: .qmd
      format_name: quarto
      format_version: '1.0'
      jupytext_version: 1.19.4
  kernelspec:
    display_name: Python 3 (ipykernel)
    language: python
    name: python3
---

Random working drafts and low-effort notes. Newest first.
